name: ASRock B760M PRO RS WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - Killer 802.11axe WiFi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASRock B760M PRO RS WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ASRock micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 socket with DDR5 support and Wi-Fi 6E connectivity.
